title: Password reset request
description: User forgot account password and cannot log in.

title: Email not sending
description: User is unable to send emails from Outlook.

title: Printer out of paper
description: Office printer shows 'Out of Paper' error.

title: Computer running slow
description: Desktop computer is taking longer than usual to open programs.

title: WiFi not connecting
description: Laptop cannot connect to office WiFi network.

title: Monitor not turning on
description: User's monitor remains black after powering on.

title: Keyboard not working
description: Some keys on the keyboard are not responding.

title: Cannot access shared folder
description: User gets access denied message when opening shared folder.

title: Software update needed
description: User requests update of installed browser to latest version.

title: Mouse not detected
description: USB mouse is not recognized by the computer.

title: Forgot WiFi password
description: User needs WiFi password to connect new device.

title: Screen flickering
description: Laptop screen flickers intermittently during use.
